baseline.reason: Falsely attributes root cause to a linesize>width mismatch causing OOB read/walk. The actual vulnerability is unconditional memcpy of top 2 and bottom 2 rows without height validation (h<4 leads to OOBW). Only correct about the vulnerable function and general file location.

vastdb.reason: Falsely attributes root cause to w exceeding buffer linesize (impossible since dst_linesize is passed as width=w). The actual fix adds if(h>1), if(h>2), if(h>3) guards around unconditional memcpy calls for top2/bottom2 rows. Correct about function location but wrong mechanism.
